name: Mexi-Corn Lasagna
recipeIngredient: 17 ounces Whole kernel corn, canned, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat and drain it.
2. Add corn, tomato sauce, picante sauce, chili powder, and cumin to the skillet. Simmer, stirring frequently for 5 minutes.
3. In a separate bowl, combine cottage cheese, beaten eggs, grated Parmesan cheese, oregano, and garlic salt until well mixed.
4. Arrange six tortillas at the bottom and up the sides of a lightly greased 9x13x2-inch baking dish, overlapping as needed.
5. Spoon half of the meat mixture over the tortillas.
6. Spread the cheese mixture evenly over the meat layer.
7. Cover with remaining tortillas, again overlapping as necessary.
8. Finish by topping with the rest of the meat mixture.
9. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F for about 30 minutes, or until hot and bubbly.
10. Remove from the oven and sprinkle with additional cheese before serving. Let stand for 10 minutes before serving. Serves 8.
